message:
feat(sequence): implement comprehensive sequence diagram IR and parsing

Add IrSequenceMeta infrastructure and parse all major sequence diagram
features: autonumber, notes, activations, participant box groups,
lifecycle events (create/destroy), and interaction fragments (loop, alt,
opt, par, critical, break, rect). Includes SVG autonumber rendering.

Closes: bd-6zd9, bd-508m, bd-7g6d, bd-aknv, bd-e1sg, bd-drav

- Add IrSequenceMeta with typed fields for all sequence constructs
- Add NotePosition, FragmentKind, LifecycleEventKind enums
- Add IrActivation, IrSequenceNote, IrSequenceFragment, etc. types
- Extend IrBuilder with activation stacks, fragment nesting, group tracking
- Parse autonumber, Note left/right/over, activate/deactivate, +/- syntax
- Parse box/end grouping, create participant, destroy
- Parse loop/alt/opt/par/critical/break/rect fragments with nesting
- 30+ new tests across fm-core and fm-parser

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
